feed.title: Anthropic
feed.subtitle: Anthropic Newsroom, Research, and Engineering posts in one feed.

entry.title: Introducing Claude for Teachers
entry.content: Introducing Claude for Teachers

entry.title: How Canada uses Claude
entry.content: How Canada uses Claude

entry.title: Anthropic commits $10 million to Canadian AI research
entry.content: Anthropic is committing $10M to Canadian research institutions to fund the next generation of AI research.

entry.title: How Claude's values vary by model and language
entry.content: We analyzed 300,000 real conversations to measure the values Claude expresses across models and languages, compressed into four interpretable axes.

entry.title: How Claude Performs on Robotics Tasks
entry.content: Do language models’ strengths transfer to robotics? Can a model perceive a scene, understand a particular robot’s state, and issue actions that reliably effect change in the physical world? We ran tests to find out.

entry.title: UST is bringing Claude to physical AI
entry.content: UST is bringing Claude to physical AI

entry.title: Ben Bernanke appointed to Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust
entry.content: Ben Bernanke appointed to Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust

entry.title: Inviting hard questions
entry.content: We're asking the public for their hardest questions about AI, and committing to show our work as we address them.

entry.title: A new way to reflect on how you use Claude
entry.content: Introducing a new way to reflect on and refine how you use Claude. It lets you easily track and visualize how you use Claude, and decide whether that time aligns with your goals.

entry.title: An off switch for dual use knowledge in AI models
entry.content: New results on a method of controlling access to potentially dangerous AI capabilities

entry.title: A global workspace in language models
entry.content: Interpretability research on Claude's internal thoughts.

entry.title: Government of Alberta uses Claude to find and fix cybersecurity vulnerabilities
entry.content: The Government of Alberta has been using Claude Code with both Opus and Sonnet models to review its systems, find vulnerabilities, and fix them.

entry.title: More details on Fable 5’s cyber safeguards and our jailbreak framework
entry.content: What is and isn't blocked by our cyber classifiers, and a first draft of our jailbreak severity framework

entry.title: Redeploying Claude Fable 5
entry.content: Anthropic is redeploying Claude Fable 5 starting July 1 following the lifting of export controls, with updated cybersecurity safeguards and a new industry jailbreak framework.

entry.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists
entry.content: Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.

entry.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5
entry.content: Our most agentic Sonnet yet, with top-tier intelligence for coding and everyday professional work.

entry.title: Anthropic Economic Index report: Cadences
entry.content: In the latest Anthropic Economic Index report, we look at when people come to Claude, what they produce with it, and how they perceive AI’s impact on their work.

entry.title: Introducing Claude Tag
entry.content: Introducing Claude Tag

entry.title: Project Fetch: Phase two
entry.content: We report results from our latest test of whether Claude can help Anthropic employees perform sophisticated robotics tasks. We found that Claude Opus 4.7, operating without human assistance, was about 20 times faster than the fastest human team at all tasks completed by participants less than a year ago.

entry.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
entry.content: Anthropic opens Seoul and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem—with the enterprises, startups, and researchers behind some of the most ambitious deployments of Claude.

entry.title: Agentic coding and persistent returns to expertise
entry.content: Agentic coding and persistent returns to expertise

entry.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
entry.content: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 by any foreign national, whether inside or outside the United States.

entry.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
entry.content: We’re announcing a partnership with Tata Consultancy Services (TCS). TCS will provide Claude to 50,000 of its own employees across 56 countries; build Claude-powered products for clients in financial services, healthcare, the public sector, and other regulated industries; and join the Claude Partner Network.

entry.title: Results from first Anthropic Public Record
entry.content: Anthropic Public Record is a national survey of attitudes and opinions towards AI.

entry.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
entry.content: We’re announcing a multi-year global alliance with DXC Technology, one of the world’s largest IT services companies.

entry.title: Introducing Claude Corps
entry.content: We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America.

entry.title: Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5
entry.content: Today we’re launching Claude Fable 5: a Mythos-class model that we’ve made safe for general use.

entry.title: N days
entry.content: N days

entry.title: Measuring LLMs’ impact on N-day exploits
entry.content: Measuring LLMs’ impact on N-day exploits

entry.title: Paving the way for agents in biology
entry.content: Paving the way for agents in biology

entry.title: Making Claude a chemist
entry.content: Making Claude a chemist

entry.title: Mapping AI-enabled cyber threats
entry.content: We’ve spent the past year investigating how threat actors are weaponizing AI to conduct cyber operations. Today, we’re sharing a new analysis that maps these real-world attacks onto the MITRE ATT&CK framework, a database of tactics and techniques used by cyberattackers.

entry.title: Mapping AI-enabled cyber threats: Insights from the LLM ATT&CK Navigator
entry.content: Mapping AI-enabled cyber threats: Insights from the LLM ATT&CK Navigator

entry.title: Introducing the Services Track and Partner Hub of the Claude Partner Network
entry.content: In March, we launched the Claude Partner Network, a program for the firms that help enterprises put Claude into production.. Today, we’re announcing two new components that make this ecosystem easier for customers to navigate.

entry.title: What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats
entry.content: As AI transforms the nature of and methods behind cyberattacks, how well do the techniques and frameworks used by the security community hold up? In a new report, we seek to answer that question.

entry.title: Expanding Project Glasswing
entry.content: We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries

entry.title: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
entry.content: Anthropic has confidentially submitted a draft S-1 registration statement to the Securities and Exchange Commission

entry.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
entry.content: Anthropic has raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital.

entry.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8
entry.content: Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.8, is an upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.

entry.title: Coding agents in the social sciences
entry.content: Results from a survey of 1,260 social scientists about AI and coding agent use.

entry.title: Anthropic opens Milan office to support Italian enterprise, research, and developers
entry.content: We're opening a new office in Milan, our sixth in Europe.

entry.title: Anthropic appoints KiYoung Choi as Representative Director of Korea
entry.content: KiYoung Choi is joining Anthropic as Representative Director of Korea, ahead of the opening of our Seoul office.

entry.title: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas"
entry.content: The full text of Chris Olah's remarks on the Pope's encyclical on AI

entry.title: Anthropic's coordinated vulnerability disclosure dashboard
entry.content: Anthropic's coordinated vulnerability disclosure dashboard

entry.title: Measuring LLMs’ ability to develop exploits
entry.content: Measuring LLMs’ ability to develop exploits

entry.title: Project Glasswing: An initial update
entry.content: An early update on what we've learned from Project Glasswing.

entry.title: KPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance
entry.content: KPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance

entry.title: Widening the conversation on frontier AI
entry.content: Widening the conversation on frontier AI

entry.title: Anthropic acquires Stainless
entry.content: Anthropic acquires Stainless

entry.title: 2028: Two scenarios for global AI leadership
entry.content: Our views on the AI competition between the US and China.

entry.title: Teaching Claude why
entry.content: New research on how we've reduced agentic misalignment

entry.title: Focus areas for The Anthropic Institute
entry.content: At The Anthropic Institute (TAI), we’ll be using the information we can access from within a frontier lab to investigate AI’s impact on the world, and sharing our learnings with the public. Here, we’re sharing the questions that drive our research agenda.

entry.title: Donating our open-source alignment tool
entry.content: Updating Petri to version 3.0 and donating it to Meridian Labs

entry.title: Natural Language Autoencoders
entry.content: Turning Claude's thoughts into text

entry.title: How people ask Claude for personal guidance
entry.content: How people ask Claude for personal guidance

entry.title: Evaluating Claude’s bioinformatics research capabilities with BioMysteryBench
entry.content: Evaluating Claude’s bioinformatics research capabilities with BioMysteryBench

entry.title: An update on our election safeguards
entry.content: An update on our election safeguards

entry.title: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
entry.content: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports

entry.title: Announcing the Anthropic Economic Index Survey
entry.content: Announcing the Anthropic Economic Index Survey

entry.title: Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
entry.content: Today, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.

entry.title: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands
entry.content: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands

entry.title: Assessing Claude Mythos Preview’s cybersecurity capabilities
entry.content: Assessing Claude Mythos Preview’s cybersecurity capabilities

entry.title: How we built Claude Code auto mode: a safer way to skip permissions
entry.content: How we built Claude Code auto mode: a safer way to skip permissions

entry.title: Harness design for long-running application development
entry.content: Harness design for long-running application development

entry.title: Partnering with Mozilla to improve Firefox’s security
entry.content: Partnering with Mozilla to improve Firefox’s security

entry.title: Reverse engineering Claude's CVE-2026-2796 exploit
entry.content: Reverse engineering Claude's CVE-2026-2796 exploit

entry.title: Eval awareness in Claude Opus 4.6’s BrowseComp performance
entry.content: Eval awareness in Claude Opus 4.6’s BrowseComp performance

entry.title: Evaluating and mitigating the growing risk of LLM-discovered 0-days
entry.content: Evaluating and mitigating the growing risk of LLM-discovered 0-days

entry.title: Building a C compiler with a team of parallel Claudes
entry.content: Building a C compiler with a team of parallel Claudes

entry.title: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals
entry.content: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals

entry.title: Claude is a space to think
entry.content: We’ve made a choice: Claude will remain ad-free. We explain why advertising incentives are incompatible with a genuinely helpful AI assistant, and how we plan to expand access without compromising user trust.

entry.title: Designing AI resistant technical evaluations
entry.content: What we learned from three iterations of a performance engineering take-home that Claude keeps beating.

entry.title: AI models are showing a greater ability to find and exploit vulnerabilities on realistic cyber ranges
entry.content: AI models are showing a greater ability to find and exploit vulnerabilities on realistic cyber ranges

entry.title: Finding bugs across the Python ecosystem with Claude and property-based testing
entry.content: Finding bugs across the Python ecosystem with Claude and property-based testing

entry.title: Demystifying evals for AI agents
entry.content: Demystifying evals for AI agents

entry.title: Experimenting with AI to defend critical infrastructure
entry.content: Experimenting with AI to defend critical infrastructure

entry.title: Project Vend: Phase two
entry.content: How Claude turned around its failing vending machine business

entry.title: AI agents find $4.6M in blockchain smart contract exploits
entry.content: AI agents find $4.6M in blockchain smart contract exploits

entry.title: Effective harnesses for long-running agents
entry.content: Effective harnesses for long-running agents

entry.title: Introducing advanced tool use on the Claude Developer Platform
entry.content: Claude can now discover, learn, and execute tools dynamically to enable agents that take action in the real world. Here’s how.

entry.title: Project Fetch: Can Claude train a robot dog?
entry.content: Project Fetch: Can Claude train a robot dog?

entry.title: Code execution with MCP: building more efficient AI agents
entry.content: Learn how code execution with the Model Context Protocol enables agents to handle more tools while using fewer tokens, reducing context overhead by up to 98.7%.

entry.title: Making Claude Code more secure and autonomous with sandboxing
entry.content: Learn how Claude Code's new sandboxing feature protects developers with filesystem and network isolation, reducing permission prompts and increasing user safety.

entry.title: Equipping agents for the real world with Agent Skills
entry.content: Discover how Anthropic builds AI agents with practical capabilities through modular skills, enabling them to handle complex real-world tasks more effectively and reliably.

entry.title: Building AI for cyber defenders
entry.content: Building AI for cyber defenders

entry.title: Effective context engineering for AI agents
entry.content: Effective context engineering for AI agents

entry.title: A postmortem of three recent issues
entry.content: This is a technical report on three bugs that intermittently degraded responses from Claude. Below we explain what happened, why it took time to fix, and what we're changing.

entry.title: Writing effective tools for AI agents—using AI agents
entry.content: Writing effective tools for AI agents—using AI agents

entry.title: Why do we take LLMs seriously as a potential source of biorisk?
entry.content: Why do we take LLMs seriously as a potential source of biorisk?

entry.title: Developing nuclear safeguards for AI through public-private partnership
entry.content: Developing nuclear safeguards for AI through public-private partnership

entry.title: Claude is competitive with humans in (some) cyber competitions
entry.content: Claude is competitive with humans in (some) cyber competitions

entry.title: Detailed cyber evaluations of Claude 4
entry.content: Detailed cyber evaluations of Claude 4

entry.title: Project Vend: Can Claude run a small shop? (And why does that matter?)
entry.content: Project Vend: Can Claude run a small shop? (And why does that matter?)

entry.title: Claude Desktop Extensions: One-click MCP server installation for Claude Desktop
entry.content: Claude Desktop Extensions: One-click MCP server installation for Claude Desktop

entry.title: LLMs with cyber toolkits can conduct multistage cyber operations on business-sized computer networks
entry.content: LLMs with cyber toolkits can conduct multistage cyber operations on business-sized computer networks

entry.title: How we built our multi-agent research system
entry.content: On the the engineering challenges and lessons learned from building Claude's Research system

entry.title: Best practices for Claude Code - Claude Code Docs
entry.content: Tips and patterns for getting the most out of Claude Code, from configuring your environment to scaling across parallel sessions.

entry.title: The "think" tool: Enabling Claude to stop and think
entry.content: A blog post for developers, describing a new method for complex tool-use situations

entry.title: Claude SWE-Bench Performance
entry.content: Explore Claude's breakthrough performance on SWE-Bench, demonstrating advanced software engineering capabilities and code generation accuracy. Learn about our technical evaluation methods.

entry.title: Building Effective AI Agents
entry.content: Discover how Anthropic approaches the development of reliable AI agents. Learn about our research on agent capabilities, safety considerations, and technical framework for building trustworthy AI.
